title: Database I/O Translation
text: Database I/O Translation Indicates whether data strings should be translated on database input and output. Value Description Not defined No data is translated N No data is translated Y Data is translated using the translation tables defined for the field's parent component. Applies to Modeled Field Interface Related Links Database Translation Tables Database translation tables convert character strings during database input or output. This makes it possible to display characters stored in the database that are normally not visible (such as typesetting codes), or to store a key entered in a field as another string.
